headline: Brown-Forman B (BF.B) Misses Q4 Earnings Estimates
summary: Brown-Forman B (BF.B) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -63.82% and +4.05%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Eli Manning weighs in on Giants QB Jaxson Dart's Trump rally fallout
summary: Eli Manning spoke about political activities from athletes after Giants QB Jaxson Dart introduced President Donald Trump at a rally.
